mapper.sql: select ss.slot_id, ss.schedule_id, ss.doctor_id, d.dept_id, sd.dept_name, d.doctor_name, d.level_id, rl.level_name, rl.fee, ss.schedule_date, date_format(ss.start_time, '%H:%i') as start_time, date_format(ss.end_time, '%H:%i') as end_time, ss.max_number, ss.reserved_number, greatest(ifnull(ss.max_number, 0) - ifnull(ss.reserved_number, 0), 0) as available_number, ss.status, ss.create_time, ss.update_time from schedule_slot ss inner join doctor d on d.doctor_id = ss.doctor_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = d.dept_id left join regist_level rl on rl.level_id = d.level_id
mapper.insert:
insert into schedule_slot
schedule_id, doctor_id, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, max_number, reserved_number, status, create_time, update_time,
#{scheduleId}, #{doctorId}, #{scheduleDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{maxNumber}, #{reservedNumber}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.select: select count(1) from schedule_slot where schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
select count(1) from schedule_slot where schedule_id = #{scheduleId} and reserved_number > 0
mapper.update: update schedule_slot set reserved_number = reserved_number + 1, status = case when reserved_number + 1 >= max_number then '1' else status end, update_time = now() where slot_id = #{slotId} and status = '0' and reserved_number < max_number

update schedule_slot set reserved_number = reserved_number - 1, status = case when status = '1' and reserved_number - 1 < max_number then '0' else status end, update_time = now() where slot_id = #{slotId} and reserved_number > 0
update schedule_slot set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where slot_id = #{slotId}
